mapper.select: select ci.id, ci.product_id as productId, p.name as productName, p.product_no as productNo, p.category as category, p.price as price, p.image as image, s.store_name as storeName, ci.quantity as quantity, p.status as productStatus, p.sku as sku from cart_items ci join product p on p.id = ci.product_id join seller s on s.id = p.seller_id where ci.cart_id = #{cartId}
